completed_since_last_snapshot: S1.9 deterministic replay integration test implemented: test/integration/DeterministicReplay.test.ts (5 tests). A pure replaySystem<ReplayWorld> draws nextFloat(state.rng), threads the RNG forward through GameState.rng (proving the PRNG is state, not a global), and folds both the draw (world.noise) and the current input axis (world.position) into the world immutably. runReplay(seed, tape) drives a fresh Engine+StateManager through a hardcoded literal tape mixing sub-step / multi-step / a >MAX_FRAME_SECONDS clamped spike, committing each frame's input then ticking. Assertions: (1) identical (seed,tape) -> deepEqual AND identical FNV-1a state hash across two independent runs; (2) non-vacuous (tick>0, noise!=0, tick==clock.stepIndex); (3) spike clamps to 15 steps not unbounded catch-up; (4) different seed -> different hash (noise diverges, position identical); (5) different input tape same deltas -> different hash (position diverges symmetrically, noise identical). No Math.random / Date anywhere.
Full suite now 60/60 passing (was 55; +5 integration). `npm run typecheck` and `npm run gate:full` clean.
No source or PKG structural changes — S1.9 is a test-only slice (consistent with S1.8). pkg_hash remains s1-e6f7a8. No new design-memory decision.

critical_warnings_for_next_session: RUN THE REBOOT LIFECYCLE FIRST: read this handoff, confirm pkg_hash s1-e6f7a8 matches meta/project_knowledge_graph.json, then `npm test` (expect 60 passing). If red, fix before S1.10.

S1.10 CLOSES MILESTONE M0 — this is a gate, not a formality. Do NOT flip a REQ to VERIFIED unless its FULL Phase-scope (per the backlog's Phase column) is genuinely satisfied and mapped to a passing test. REQ-121 (P1,P2) and REQ-160 (P3,P11) are multi-phase and must stay IN_PROGRESS/NOT_STARTED — flipping them early is exactly the four-state-ledger-becomes-fiction anti-pattern.

Before flipping ANY REQ, open docs/requirements_backlog.md and docs/IRD.md and read the actual P1 REQ membership + phase columns — do not rely on the list in this handoff's pending_logical_transformation without verifying it against those files (zero-assumption invariant).

Milestone closure requires the Subtractive Removal pass (delete dead scaffolding/unused exports) and a PRD compliance audit — see jump-once-task stage 8 and docs/session_protocol.md. Don't skip these; M0 is the first milestone and sets the precedent.

P2 (Data Models & Level Definition Schema) MUST NOT begin until S1.10 files docs/verification/P1.md and P1 is marked VERIFIED. Content generation (levels/chapters) remains HARD-GATED behind M2 regardless.

Do NOT change FIXED_STEP_SECONDS or introduce delta-time scaling (dm-0003) — the replay guarantee proven in S1.9 depends on it. Do NOT mutate GameState in place (dm-0004). Engine commits even on a zero-step tick by design (dm-0007).
The private npm mirror npm.shootsta.com is broken; .npmrc pins registry.npmjs.org — don't remove it.
